events.summary: Discuss the BPM recommendation deck prior to...

prep.summary: You need to debrief on your last two syncs with Steve—focusing on navigating the Gen AI Council governance and transitioning long-term developer tools to official TPM apps. The Spider Tool tech decision draft is now complete—requiring immediate alignment with a CIO lead to integrate historical context—while the Socotra incubation project still faces unresolved integration friction. You must also address critical team capacity constraints—especially Mark's ongoing advocacy with Deepak for permanent resource relief.
tasks: Align with the CIO lead to reconcile the Spider Tool tech decision draft with historical context.
Meet with Deepak's team to resolve the manual reporting risks associated with the Socotra incubation integration debate.
Address the governance dotted line with Chuck and the Gen AI Council regarding the transition of personal tools to official TPM apps.
Follow up on the proposed Enterprise Architecture Library initiative discussed at the horizontal planning meeting.
prep.title: Sync with Mark | Steve

prep.summary: Your review of the work notes—specifically the May 21 P&C Sandbox Discussion—reveals that two-way texting, listed as 2A Text, is slated for the critical 2026 rollouts. The Optimization team demands an isolated sandbox environment—simulating experiences for up to 9,000 frontline adjusters—to prepare for these massive process changes. Technical leadership still faces unresolved blockers—specifically funding, enterprise ownership, and a lack of environment parity across downstream applications.
tasks: Resolve funding and enterprise ownership constraints—specifically for the 2026 sandbox environment—before proceeding with 2A Text testing.
Establish technical guidelines for testing 2A Text at scale without relying on unmasked, stale production data.
Coordinate with the Optimization team to map out the 2A Text integration dependencies across downstream enterprise applications.
Determine the minimum user footprint required to validate the 2A Text workflow—aiming to lower the initial 9,000-user baseline.
prep.title: TWT Security and MFA Requirements

events.summary: EMG Engage - Intro to Architecture w/Mark Francis
EMG Engage - Intro to Architecture w/Mark Francis
Monthly 1:1 Architecture Sync w/ Suhas | Mark Francis

prep.summary: Prepare to brief Suhas on critical operational bottlenecks—specifically the friction around unplanned pilot projects, the stalling of Resiliency/NART mapping, and the massive environment-parity challenges of the 2026 P&C sandbox. Address key infrastructure decisions head-on—including the ServiceNow event-monitoring POC versus homegrown solutions, the transition of telematics data to AWS/Iceberg, and the rollout of Project IVA. Manage emerging AI governance issues by pushing for consumption-based chargebacks on LLMs and formalizing generative AI requirements processing.
tasks: Establish a consistent engagement framework to bring architecture into pilot projects earlier.
Revise the ServiceNow POC presentation deck for Dan Griffiths by hiding slides 6, 7, 15, and 515.
Schedule an alignment meeting with Deepak to resolve the stalled Resiliency/NART process mapping.
Define the 2025 telematics data ingestion framework to transition smoothly to the AWS, Iceberg, and Domino Nexus architecture.
Automate data validation for Change Review Groups by implementing a Snowflake-driven batch job to flag incomplete records.
prep.title: Monthly 1:1 Architecture Sync w/ Suhas | Mark Francis
